title: hieracium vulgatum subsp. wainioi
intro: Hieracium vulgatum subsp. wainioi, also known as Wainio's hawkweed or Hieracium wainioi, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is native to Finland. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hieracium vulgatum subsp. wainioi include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to treat digestive issues, skin conditions, and respiratory problems.
